title: UpdatedHud
description: Replaces the HUD with a more simple version.
body:
Replaces the default HUD with a more simplified version. ![Image of Updated Hud](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Camopass/UpdatedHUD/main/Showcase01.png)
The Armor Bar will display the amount each armor piece gives you as compared to the total amount of armor you have. The Health and Hunger Bars will display your current and max hunger levels. The Air bar will show you the amount of air you have left as a percentage, and the other bars work as normal.
